title: alyssum baeticum
intro: Alyssum baeticum, also known as Baetic Alyssum or Thyme-leaved Alyssum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Alyssum baeticum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
